metadata.description: And/or Labs - AI x GTM tools for B2B SaaS analysis

plugins.name: gtm-grader
plugins.description: Scores SaaS websites against 56 research-backed checks across 10 categories: 47 optimization rules from peer-reviewed marketing science (brand messaging, page design, pricing, trials, freemium, churn, affiliates, referrals) plus 9 positioning checks from Dunford and Fletch PMM frameworks. Commands: grade, position, wins, export.
